subject: chore: delete 9 empty CSS files after Tailwind migration
body:
Remove CSS files that contain only migration comments or are empty.
All styles have been migrated to Tailwind utility classes in their
respective TSX components. CSS imports were already removed by the
migration agents.

Remaining CSS files (515 lines total):
- index.css (23) — Tailwind/DaisyUI setup
- App.css (298) — base setup, safe-area padding, mobile menu,
  shared modal/label-badge, animations, mobile media queries
- DetailDrawer.css (114) — open/close transitions, bottom sheet
- Toast.css (49) — keyframes, mobile safe-area overrides
- TimelineView.css (31) — pseudo-elements, checkbox accent-color

Tags: theme, cleanup, css-deletion
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
